bind-pdf-form-to-autofiller.title: Bind PDF Form to AutoFiller Instance
bind-pdf-form-to-autofiller.description: Shows how to create an AutoFiller object, bind a source PDF form from a file path, and prepare it for further operations such as importing data or saving the filled PDF.

fill-pdf-form-from-datatable.title: Fill PDF Form from DataTable (Excel‑derived)
fill-pdf-form-from-datatable.description: Shows how to create a DataTable (simulating Excel column headers) and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to bind a PDF template, import the table data, and save the filled PDF form.

import-datatable-into-pdf-form.title: Import DataTable with ReadOnly and Unique Columns into PDF Form
import-datatable-into-pdf-form.description: Shows how to configure DataColumn properties such as ReadOnly and Unique, then import the DataTable into a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller.

import-datatable-into-pdf-form__v2.title: Import DataTable into PDF Form using AutoFiller
import-datatable-into-pdf-form__v2.description: Shows how to bind a PDF form template, import a DataTable whose column names match AcroForm fields, and save the filled PDF with Aspose.Pdf AutoFiller.

save-filled-pdf-preserve-layout.title: Save Filled PDF While Preserving Layout
save-filled-pdf-preserve-layout.description: Shows how to load a previously filled PDF using the Form facade and save it to a new file, keeping the original layout unchanged.

generate-pdf-per-datatable-row.title: Generate PDF with One Page per DataTable Row
generate-pdf-per-datatable-row.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to import a DataTable and create a merged PDF where each row is rendered on a separate page, then validates the page count.

map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-fields.title: Map DataTable Columns to PDF Field Names for AutoFiller
map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-fields.description: Demonstrates how to rename DataTable columns to match PDF form field identifiers and then use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to populate a PDF template automatically.

fill-pdf-form-with-datatable-custom-colu.title: Fill PDF Form Using DataTable with Custom Columns
fill-pdf-form-with-datatable-custom-colu.description: Demonstrates adding custom columns to a DataTable, binding it to a PDF template with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller, and saving the filled PDF.

fill-pdf-form-from-multiple-csv-workshee.title: Fill PDF Form from Multiple CSV Worksheets
fill-pdf-form-from-multiple-csv-workshee.description: The example reads each CSV file (representing an Excel worksheet) into a DataTable and uses Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to merge the data into a PDF form, generating a separate filled PDF for each worksheet.

fill-pdf-form-with-datatable-exception-h.title: Fill PDF Form with DataTable and Handle Exceptions
fill-pdf-form-with-datatable-exception-h.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to bind a template PDF, import a DataTable into form fields, save the filled document, and capture missing file or PDF errors with exception handling.

fill-pdf-form-with-autofiller.title: Fill PDF Form with AutoFiller and Proper Disposal
fill-pdf-form-with-autofiller.description: Shows how to bind a PDF template, import data from a DataTable, fill form fields using AutoFiller, and automatically release unmanaged resources with a using statement.

batch-fill-pdf-template-with-datatables.title: Batch Fill PDF Template with Multiple DataTables
batch-fill-pdf-template-with-datatables.description: Demonstrates how to fill a single PDF form template repeatedly using a list of DataTable objects, creating a separate filled PDF for each data set.

fill-pdf-form-from-memory-stream.title: Fill PDF Form from Memory Stream using AutoFiller
fill-pdf-form-from-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF template from a byte array, filling its form fields with data via Aspose.Pdf.AutoFiller, and saving the result—all in memory without intermediate files.

generate-subset-pdf-from-filtered-datata.title: Generate Subset PDF from Filtered DataTable
generate-subset-pdf-from-filtered-datata.description: Creates a DataTable (simulating an exported Excel worksheet), filters rows by a column value, and writes the filtered data into a PDF table using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-pages-with-custom-names.title: Extract PDF Pages with Custom File Names from DataTable
extract-pdf-pages-with-custom-names.description: Shows how to extract specific pages from a multi‑page PDF and save each page as a separate PDF file using file names taken from a DataTable column.

validate-required-pdf-form-fields.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields Before Import
validate-required-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to verify that all required fields in a PDF form have matching columns in a DataTable before filling the form using Aspose.Pdf facades.

log-datatable-row-processing-auto-filler.title: Log DataTable Row Processing While Generating PDFs with AutoFiller
log-datatable-row-processing-auto-filler.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to fill a PDF template from a DataTable, create a separate PDF per row, and log each processed row with its page number.

encrypt-filled-pdf-with-password.title: Encrypt Filled PDF with Password
encrypt-filled-pdf-with-password.description: Demonstrates how to protect a previously filled PDF by applying user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf's Facade API. The example saves the filled document and then encrypts it with AES‑256 encryption and specific privileges.

merge-multiple-filled-pdfs.title: Merge Multiple Filled PDFs into a Single Document
merge-multiple-filled-pdfs.description: Shows how to fill a PDF form from DataTables using AutoFiller and then concatenate the generated PDFs into one consolidated file with PdfFileEditor.

convert-filled-pdf-to-byte-array.title: Convert Filled PDF to Byte Array without Saving to Disk
convert-filled-pdf-to-byte-array.description: Shows how to load a filled PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer and save it directly to a MemoryStream to obtain a byte array for web API transmission.

async-fill-pdf-from-excel.title: Asynchronously Fill PDF Form from Excel Using AutoFiller
async-fill-pdf-from-excel.description: Demonstrates loading Excel data asynchronously, binding it to a PDF template with AutoFiller, and writing the filled PDF to disk using async file I/O.

verify-filled-pdf-fields-match-datatable.title: Unit Test to Verify Filled PDF Fields Match DataTable
verify-filled-pdf-fields-match-datatable.description: Shows how to fill a PDF form with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller and then use a unit test to compare each filled field against the original DataTable values.

autofiller-retry-logic.title: AutoFiller PDF Merge with Retry Logic
autofiller-retry-logic.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to bind a PDF template, import data from a DataTable, and save the merged document while handling transient file‑access errors with an exponential back‑off retry mechanism.

generate-summary-report-pdf-pages-datata.title: Generate Summary Report Mapping PDF Pages to DataTable Rows
generate-summary-report-pdf-pages-datata.description: Iterates through each PDF page, extracts tables with TableAbsorber, and writes a CSV that maps the page number to a corresponding DataTable row identifier.

add-date-header-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Date Header to PDF Pages
add-date-header-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp to insert a header with the current date on every page of a PDF document.

fill-pdf-form-using-csv-config-mapping.title: Fill PDF Form Using CSV Data with Configurable Column Mapping
fill-pdf-form-using-csv-config-mapping.description: Demonstrates loading a JSON mapping to translate CSV column names to PDF field names, reading the first data row, and filling an Aspose.Pdf form dynamically.

fill-pdf-form-from-large-csv.title: Fill PDF Form from Large CSV Using AutoFiller
fill-pdf-form-from-large-csv.description: Demonstrates loading a large CSV (converted from XLSX) row‑by‑row into a DataTable and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to merge the data into a PDF form without exhausting memory.

fill-pdf-form-validate-size.title: Fill PDF Form from DataTable and Validate File Size
fill-pdf-form-validate-size.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf AutoFiller to populate a PDF form from a DataTable, creating a template if missing, and checking that the resulting PDF does not exceed a predefined size limit.

fill-pdf-form-from-xlsx-using-autofiller.title: Fill PDF Form from XLSX Using AutoFiller
fill-pdf-form-from-xlsx-using-autofiller.description: Shows how to create a DataTable (simulating XLSX data) and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to bind a PDF template, import the data, and save a filled PDF.

fill-pdf-form-with-timeout-cancellation.title: Fill PDF Form with Timeout Cancellation
fill-pdf-form-with-timeout-cancellation.description: Demonstrates how to fill fields in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf and abort the operation with a cancellation token if it exceeds a specified timeout.

convert-large-pdf-to-excel-with-temp-fol.title: Convert Large PDF to Excel Using a Temporary Folder
convert-large-pdf-to-excel-with-temp-fol.description: Demonstrates processing a large PDF by extracting each page to temporary files, concatenating them, and converting the combined PDF to an Excel workbook while using disk buffering to limit memory usage.

format-numeric-values-fill-pdf-form.title: Format Numeric Values and Fill PDF Form Fields
format-numeric-values-fill-pdf-form.description: Shows how to format numeric DataTable values as strings and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to populate PDF form fields.

add-image-watermark-to-filled-pdf-pages.title: Add Image Watermark to Filled PDF Pages
add-image-watermark-to-filled-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to fill a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller and then apply a semi‑transparent image watermark to every page of the resulting document.

split-filled-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.title: Split Filled PDF into Single‑Page PDFs
split-filled-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to split a filled PDF into individual one‑page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

fill-pdf-form-from-csv.title: Fill PDF Form from CSV using Aspose.Pdf
fill-pdf-form-from-csv.description: Demonstrates loading data from a CSV file into a DataTable and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to populate matching PDF form fields, then saving the filled PDF.
